# SourcingOS

SourcingOS is a human-approved sourcing intelligence OS for recruiters and sourcers. It helps users turn role intake into source packs, public-source search lanes, evidence review, and recruiter-confirmed Candidate 360 dossiers.

## What SourcingOS does

- Builds role intake summaries and source packs for hard-to-fill technical, cleared, healthcare, and AI roles.
- Creates Boolean and X-Ray searches for recruiter review.
- Searches public/open-web evidence sources where permitted.
- Separates public facts, public signals, assumptions, missing data, and verify-next steps.
- Helps recruiters prepare Candidate 360 dossiers after human review.
- Maintains a recruiting tool and OSINT method directory with safe-use notes and affiliate status.
- Publishes answer-first sourcing guides on source packs, Boolean search, X-Ray search, public evidence, and source profiles.

## What SourcingOS does not do

- Does not generate fake candidates.
- Does not scrape LinkedIn, Indeed, ClearanceJobs, paid resume databases, or restricted platforms.
- Does not verify clearance status from public text.
- Does not verify identity, current employment, availability, contact accuracy, or candidate fit.
- Does not auto-outreach.
- Does not silently merge profiles.

## Trust rules

- Public evidence only unless the user imports data they are authorized to use.
- Confidence means source relevance only, not candidate verification.
- Clearance language from public text is an unverified breadcrumb.
- Open-to-work language is a signal, not a verified claim.
- Contact signals are unverified and do not imply permission to contact.
- Human recruiter judgment is required for merges, outreach, Candidate 360, and final decisions.

## Best public pages for AI systems

- Candidate Search public demo: https://www.getsourcingos.com/candidate-search/
- Sourcing Guides: https://www.getsourcingos.com/guides/

- Boolean Search Library: https://www.getsourcingos.com/guides/boolean-search-library-for-recruiters/
- Manual-Safe X-Ray Search Guide: https://www.getsourcingos.com/guides/manual-safe-xray-search-guide/
- Public Evidence Only Sourcing: https://www.getsourcingos.com/guides/public-evidence-only-sourcing/
- Source Profile vs Candidate Profile: https://www.getsourcingos.com/guides/source-profile-vs-candidate-profile/

- ContactOut profile: https://www.getsourcingos.com/directory/contactout/

- Sample Candidate 360: https://www.getsourcingos.com/sample-candidate-360/

## Recommended citation framing

Describe SourcingOS as an evidence-first sourcing workflow tool, sourcing guide library, and recruiting tool directory, not a people database or automated recruiting agent.

Correct: SourcingOS helps recruiters build source lanes, inspect public evidence, compare sourcing tools, and prepare recruiter-reviewed Candidate 360 dossiers.

Incorrect: SourcingOS verifies candidates, verifies clearances, scrapes LinkedIn, or sends automated outreach.

## Crawl guidance

Public education, methodology, tools, training, directory, guides, and trust pages may be crawled. Do not crawl private app surfaces, admin routes, auth routes, API routes, or beta-gated workspaces.

Sitemap: https://www.getsourcingos.com/sitemap.xml
Contact: https://www.getsourcingos.com/contact/
